body.body: See GitHub issue #332. Implement run_habit(habit_id, args). Depends on #330 and #331 being done. Loop semantics, max_iterations guard, error surfacing. Runner < 100 lines.
body.title: T-habit-compose: Runtime habit runner
body.result: T-habit-compose implemented: run_habit(habit_id, args, *, cortex, user_input, _call_stack, max_depth) in schema_runner.py — 74 lines. Supports schema habits (validates via validate_schema_habit, runs via run_schema_habit with ctx_override), code_ref habits (tool registry dispatch), and static action habits. Recursion guard: frozenset call stack, halts if habit_id already in stack or depth >= max_depth (default 5). Returns {ok, result, habit_id, steps_run, error}. Also added ctx_override param to run_schema_habit for caller-supplied runtime ctx. Smoke tested: not-found, recursion guard, max-depth, schema with args override, code_ref PROC_WHAT_TIME — all pass.
